  1. uno.anahata.asi.persistence
  2. Rebindable

Uses of Interface
uno.anahata.asi.persistence.Rebindable

Packages that use Rebindable
Package
Description
uno.anahata.asi
The root package of the Anahata AI framework.
uno.anahata.asi.agi
Provides model-agnostic, intelligent configuration objects for agi sessions.
uno.anahata.asi.agi.context
Manages the conversation history and the injection of just-in-time context.
uno.anahata.asi.agi.event
Event-driven architecture for the Agi orchestrator.
uno.anahata.asi.agi.message
Provides the core message and part domain primitives for the Anahata AI framework.
uno.anahata.asi.agi.message.code
Provides specialized message parts for server-side code execution.
uno.anahata.asi.agi.message.web
Web-centric message extensions and grounding metadata.
uno.anahata.asi.agi.provider
Provides the provider-agnostic LLM connectivity and generation interfaces.
uno.anahata.asi.agi.resource
Provides the V2 Universal Resource Pipeline (URP) infrastructure.
uno.anahata.asi.agi.resource.handle
Low-level connectivity and metadata abstraction for resources.
uno.anahata.asi.agi.resource.view
Managed viewports and stateful data interpretation for resources.
uno.anahata.asi.agi.status
Provides classes for managing and broadcasting agi status events.
uno.anahata.asi.agi.tool
Provides the core framework for defining, managing, and executing local Java tools.
uno.anahata.asi.agi.tool.spi
Defines the model-agnostic domain model for the tool (function) calling subsystem.
uno.anahata.asi.agi.tool.spi.bad
Provides the domain model for tools that were requested by the model but could not be found.
uno.anahata.asi.agi.tool.spi.java
Provides the concrete domain model for tools implemented as Java methods via reflection.
uno.anahata.asi.anthropic
Provides the provider implementation for Anthropic's Claude API.
uno.anahata.asi.desktop.swing
Provides the core Swing UI components and container orchestration for the standalone Anahata ASI desktop application.
uno.anahata.asi.gemini
Provides the provider implementation for Google's Gemini API using the official GenAI Java SDK.
uno.anahata.asi.huggingface
Provides the provider implementation for the Hugging Face Inference API.
uno.anahata.asi.minimax
Provides the provider implementation for the MiniMax API using their Anthropic-compatible interface.
uno.anahata.asi.modal
Provides a pre-configured provider for Modal's GLM-5 inference endpoint.
uno.anahata.asi.nb
Core classes for the NetBeans integration of the Anahata ASI.
uno.anahata.asi.nb.resources.handle
Provides NetBeans-specific resource handles that bridge the IDE's Virtual File System (VFS) with the Anahata ASI resource model.
uno.anahata.asi.nb.tools.ide
Provides toolkits for interacting with the NetBeans IDE environment.
uno.anahata.asi.nb.tools.ide.context
Provides specialized context providers for the NetBeans IDE windowing system.
uno.anahata.asi.nb.tools.java
Provides Java-specific toolkits that leverage the NetBeans Java Source and Parsing APIs.
uno.anahata.asi.nb.tools.maven
Contains the models and tools for interacting with the Apache Maven ecosystem within the NetBeans IDE.
uno.anahata.asi.nb.tools.project
Provides a robust integration layer for NetBeans Project APIs, enabling programmatic management of the project lifecycle and environment within the ASI framework.
uno.anahata.asi.nb.tools.project.alerts
Provides real-time diagnostic and alerting capabilities for NetBeans projects within the ASI framework.
uno.anahata.asi.nb.tools.project.context
Provides a hierarchical context-injection layer for NetBeans projects.
uno.anahata.asi.openai
High-fidelity provider implementation for the OpenAI Responses API (/v1/responses).
uno.anahata.asi.openai.compatible
Provides a universal, OpenAI-compatible provider implementation for the Anahata ASI framework.
uno.anahata.asi.swing
Provides the foundational Swing UI components for managing and switching between multiple AI agi sessions.
uno.anahata.asi.swing.agi
Provides the core UI orchestration components for individual AGI sessions.
uno.anahata.asi.swing.internal
Internal Swing utilities and bridge components for Anahata ASI.
uno.anahata.asi.swing.toolkit
Swing-specific toolkit implementations and context abstractions for Anahata ASI.
uno.anahata.asi.toolkit
High-level tool implementations for autonomous agentic workflows.
uno.anahata.asi.toolkit.java
Provides the core machinery for dynamic Java compilation and execution.
uno.anahata.asi.toolkit.resources
Provides the URI-centric engine for the management and surgical mutation of multimodal resources.
uno.anahata.asi.toolkit.shell
Host-level shell execution and stream management.
uno.anahata.asi.yam.tools
Provides experimental and multimodal toolkits that extend the core ASI capabilities into browser automation, advanced audio management, and speech synthesis.
uno.anahata.asi.yam.tools.browser
Provides an abstract foundation and state management for browser automation toolkits.
uno.anahata.asi.yam.tools.chrome
Provides a specialized toolkit for controlling Google Chrome and Chromium-based browsers.
uno.anahata.asi.yam.tools.firefox
Provides the specialized toolkit for web automation using the Firefox browser.

  • Uses of Rebindable in uno.anahata.asi

    Classes in uno.anahata.asi that implement Rebindable
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    AbstractAsiContainer
    A hybrid static/instance class for managing global and application-specific configurations.
    class 
    AsiContainerPreferences
    A unified, serializable POJO that acts as a container for all user-configured preferences.

  • Uses of Rebindable in uno.anahata.asi.agi

    Classes in uno.anahata.asi.agi that implement Rebindable
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    Agi
    The central, provider-agnostic artificial super intelligence (ASI) orchestrator.
    class 
    AgiConfig
    The definitive configuration blueprint for an individual Agi session.

  • Uses of Rebindable in uno.anahata.asi.agi.context

    Classes in uno.anahata.asi.agi.context that implement Rebindable
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    BasicContextProvider
    A basic, reusable implementation of the ContextProvider interface that provides the foundational logic for hierarchical context management.
    class 
    ContextManager
    The definitive manager for an Agi session's context in the V2 architecture.
    class 
    ContextWindowGarbageCollector
    Orchestrates the monitoring and logging of the Context Window Garbage Collection (CwGC).

  • Uses of Rebindable in uno.anahata.asi.agi.event

    Classes in uno.anahata.asi.agi.event that implement Rebindable
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    BasicPropertyChangeSource
    An abstract base class providing a standard implementation of PropertyChangeSource.

  • Uses of Rebindable in uno.anahata.asi.agi.message

    Classes in uno.anahata.asi.agi.message that implement Rebindable
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    AbstractMessage
    The abstract base class for all messages in a conversation, providing common metadata and functionality for the rich, hierarchical V2 domain model.
    class 
    AbstractModelMessage<R extends Response>
    Represents a message originating from the AI model.
    class 
    AbstractPart
    The foundational component of an AbstractMessage, representing a discrete block of multimodal content.
    class 
    AgiUserMessage
    A specialized UserMessage representing intent originated by another AGI session within the same ASI container.
    class 
    BlobPart
    An abstract base class for binary data parts, such as an image or a document.
    class 
    InputUserMessage
    A specialized UserMessage designed for direct manipulation by UI components like an input panel.
    class 
    ModelBlobPart
    A specialized BlobPart for binary content generated by the model, including internal thought process details.
    class 
    ModelTextPart
    A specialized TextPart for content generated by an AI model.
    class 
    RagMessage
    A specialized UserMessage that represents just-in-time, ephemeral context provided by the environment (Retrieval-Augmented Generation).
    class 
    TextPart
    An abstract base class for text-based message parts.
    class 
    UserBlobPart
    A concrete BlobPart implementation for binary content provided by the user.
    class 
    UserMessage
    Represents a conversation message originating from the end-user.
    class 
    UserTextPart
    A concrete TextPart implementation for text content provided by the user.

  • Uses of Rebindable in uno.anahata.asi.agi.message.code

    Classes in uno.anahata.asi.agi.message.code that implement Rebindable
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    HostedCodeExecutionCallPart
    A specialized part representing a request from the model to execute code on the server (e.g., Python in OpenAI's Code Interpreter or Gemini's Code Execution).
    class 
    HostedCodeExecutionResultPart
    A specialized part representing the output or logs from a server-side code execution.

    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    WebSearchCallPart
    A specialized part representing a search query or search intent generated by the model.

    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    AbstractAiProvider
    The abstract base class for all AI model providers, now with model caching.
    class 
    RequestConfig
    The definitive, model-agnostic configuration object for a single API request.

    Modifier and Type
    Interface
    Description
    interface 
    ResourceHandle
    A strategy interface for physical or virtual connectivity to resource data.
    Classes in uno.anahata.asi.agi.resource.handle that implement Rebindable
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    AbstractResourceHandle
    Base implementation of ResourceHandle providing common owner management.
    class 
    PathHandle
    A filesystem-backed resource handle for physical local files.
    class 
    StringHandle
    A memory-backed resource handle for virtual or proposed content.
    class 
    UrlHandle
    A resource handle that points to a remote URL or a protocol-based entry.

    Modifier and Type

    TextView

    Encapsulates adjustable viewport configuration for V2 text resources.

    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    AnahataToolkit
    The base class for all AI toolkits.
    class 
    ToolManager
    Manages the lifecycle of all AI tools, including registration, configuration, and lookup.

  • Uses of Rebindable in uno.anahata.asi.agi.tool.spi

    Classes in uno.anahata.asi.agi.tool.spi that implement Rebindable
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    AbstractTool<P extends AbstractToolParameter, C extends AbstractToolCall>
    The abstract base class for a tool, now generic on its Parameter and Call types.
    class 
    AbstractToolCall<T extends AbstractTool<?,?>, R extends AbstractToolResponse<?>>
    Represents a request to execute a specific tool.
    class 
    AbstractToolResponse<C extends AbstractToolCall<?,?>>
    Represents the response of a tool call, designed for deferred execution.

  • Uses of Rebindable in uno.anahata.asi.agi.tool.spi.bad

    Classes in uno.anahata.asi.agi.tool.spi.bad that implement Rebindable
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    BadTool
    A special tool implementation representing a tool that was requested by the model but was not found in the registered toolkits.
    class 
    BadToolCall
    Represents a call to a BadTool, capturing an invalid tool request from the model.
    class 
    BadToolResponse
    The response for a BadToolCall.

  • Uses of Rebindable in uno.anahata.asi.agi.tool.spi.java

    Classes in uno.anahata.asi.agi.tool.spi.java that implement Rebindable
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    JavaMethodTool
    A model-agnostic, stateful representation of a single Java method tool.
    class 
    JavaMethodToolCall
    A model-agnostic representation of a request to execute a specific Java method tool.
    class 
    JavaMethodToolResponse
    A rich POJO that captures the complete and final outcome of a single tool call.
    class 
    JavaObjectToolkit
    A domain object that parses a Java class via reflection to build a complete, self-contained Toolkit, including all its tools and parameters.

    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    OpenTopComponentsContextProvider
    Provides a real-time Markdown table of all open TopComponents (windows) in the IDE.
    class 
    OutputTabsContextProvider
    Provides a list of all open tabs in the NetBeans Output Window, including a tail of the content for each tab.

    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description

    AbstractProjectContextProvider
    Common base class for context providers that are bound to a specific NetBeans project.

    ProjectContextProvider
    A hierarchical context provider for a specific NetBeans project.
    class 
    ProjectFilesContextProvider
    Provides a real-time view of a project's file and folder structure.
    class 
    ProjectStructureContextProvider
    Provides a unified, architecturally-aware view of a project's structure.

    Description

    Modifier and Type

    Description

    AsiContainer
    The definitive toolkit for managing and inspecting the ASI container and its active sessions.

    The definitive core toolkit for audio operations.

    A specialized toolkit for managing the conversation history, including metadata injection and surgical pruning of messages and parts.

    A toolkit for interacting with the host operating system and JVM.

    The definitive toolkit for managing the current agi session's metadata, tool capabilities, and context pruning policies.
